---
name: Licensing question
about: Ask about commercial use, licensing constraints, or a possible separate licensing arrangement
title: "[Licensing] "
labels: licensing
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe your intended use at a practical level.

## Deployment model

Explain whether this is internal use, customer-hosted, SaaS, embedded distribution, or another delivery model.

## What you need clarified

List the specific licensing or commercial questions you want answered.

## Expected timeline

Mention whether this is exploratory or tied to an active procurement or launch window.

## Additional context

Add any constraints that matter for the discussion.
